title: CLI: /group send <name> <text> command with MLS encryption
description:
What: Add /group send command that encrypts and sends a message to a named group.

Algorithm:
1. Parse /group send <name> <text>  (name may not contain spaces; text is rest)
2. Resolve group_name to group_id from active_groups
3. Serialize ClearMessage::Chat { text: text.to_string() } to bytes
4. If mls.has_group_id(group_id.as_bytes()):
   a. encrypt via mls.encrypt_for_group(group_id.as_bytes(), &clear_bytes)
   b. payload = encrypted_bytes
5. Else:
   a. payload = clear_bytes (pre-MLS fallback, acceptable for Phase 5 MVP)
6. Send JsonRpcRequest(GROUP_SEND, GroupSendParams { group_id, payload })
7. Response: print [group_name] message sent

Defensive rules:
- group not found in active_groups → print error, do not send
- MLS encrypt failure → Err, print error to user, do not crash
- Empty text → print usage, do not send

Team: standard R+I+T
acceptance_criteria: cargo build -p nie passes; /group send to unknown group prints error; /group send to known group sends GroupSendParams with non-empty payload
